# CrawlReady

> AI Readiness Score platform — diagnostic tool that scores, monitors, and optimizes websites for AI crawlers and agents.

## What is CrawlReady?

CrawlReady analyzes websites to determine how well they are visible to AI crawlers like GPTBot (OpenAI), ClaudeBot (Anthropic), and PerplexityBot. It produces an AI Readiness Score (0-100) with three sub-scores:

- **Crawlability (50%)**: Can the AI crawler see and read the content?
- **Agent Readiness (25%)**: Does the site provide structured data, llms.txt, and machine-readable formats?
- **Agent Interaction (25%)**: Does the site support content negotiation, markdown responses, and AI-specific endpoints?

## Core Features

- Free instant diagnostic scan for any URL
- Side-by-side visual diff: browser view vs bot view
- EU AI Act compliance checklist
- Actionable recommendations to improve AI visibility
- Public shareable score pages (crawlready.app/score/{domain})

## API

- `POST /api/v1/scan` — Scan a URL and get full AI Readiness Score
- `GET /api/v1/score/{domain}` — Get the latest score for a domain

## Links

- Website: https://crawlready.app
- Score page example: https://crawlready.app/score/stripe.com
